mapper.sql: select s.supplier_id, s.supplier_code, s.supplier_name, s.contact_name, s.contact_phone, s.settlement_type, s.payment_days, s.supplier_level, s.lead_time_days, s.min_order_amount, s.quality_score, s.delivery_score, s.service_score, s.preferred_flag, s.status, coalesce(p.purchase_order_count, 0) as purchase_order_count, coalesce(p.open_purchase_amount, 0) as open_purchase_amount, p.last_purchase_time, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from erp_supplier s left join ( select supplier_id, count(*) as purchase_order_count, sum(case when purchase_status not in ('completed', 'done', 'closed') then total_with_tax else 0 end) as open_purchase_amount, max(create_time) as last_purchase_time from erp_purchase_order group by supplier_id ) p on p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
mapper.delete: delete from erp_supplier where supplier_id in #{supplierId}
